name: tribemd-qa-platform
description: Plataforma enterprise de QA automatizado para tribemd.com (BR/US/ES). Foco em defeitos com impacto real ao usuário: i18n, consistência entre locales, links quebrados, regressão visual e exploração automática.

scripts.full-audit: playwright test tests/regression --project=desktop-chromium ; playwright test tests/visual --project=desktop-chromium --project=tablet --project=mobile-iphone --project=mobile-android
scripts.report:allure: allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report && allure open allure-report
scripts.report:all: npm run report:qa && npm run report:dashboard
scripts.clean: rimraf allure-results allure-report evidencias reports test-results
scripts.qa:locale: playwright test tests/regression --project=desktop-chromium ; playwright test tests/visual --project=desktop-chromium --project=tablet --project=mobile-iphone --project=mobile-android ; npm run report:all
scripts.qa:all: npm run qa:br && npm run qa:us && npm run qa:es
scripts.ci: SKIP_SNAPSHOTS=1 playwright test tests/regression tests/visual --project=desktop-chromium; rc=$?; npm run report:all; exit $rc
scripts.links:br: QA_LOCALE=br QA_AUTH=1 playwright test tests/regression/navigation.spec.ts --project=desktop-chromium ; QA_LOCALE=br npm run report:all
scripts.links:us: QA_LOCALE=us QA_AUTH=1 playwright test tests/regression/navigation.spec.ts --project=desktop-chromium ; QA_LOCALE=us npm run report:all
scripts.links:es: QA_LOCALE=es QA_AUTH=1 playwright test tests/regression/navigation.spec.ts --project=desktop-chromium ; QA_LOCALE=es npm run report:all
